userStories.title: Alembic migration - EU metadata columns on norma table
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='norma' AND column_name IN ('celex','tipo_norma','url_eurlex','vigente','derogada_por')"); echo "EU columns: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed MiFIR/MiFID II core regulations
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32014L0065','32014R0600','32017R0571','32017R0590','32017R0565')"); echo "MiFIR/MiFID norms: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed EMIR + DORA regulations
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32012R0648','32019R0834','32022R2554')"); echo "EMIR+DORA: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed SFTR + CRR regulations
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32015R2365','32013R0575','32019R0876')"); echo "SFTR+CRR: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed UCITS + AIFMD regulations for SGIIC
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32009L0065','32011L0061','32013R0231')"); echo "UCITS+AIFMD: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed ESMA Guidelines as documento_interpretativo
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documento_interpretativo WHERE fuente='esma' AND tipo_documento='guideline_esma'"); echo "ESMA Guidelines: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 4 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Upgrade verified count using loaded EU norms
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sociedad_valores' AND verified=true"); echo "sociedad_valores verified: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 20 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: New MCP tool - buscar_norma_eu
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_tools_eu.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: REST endpoint - GET /v1/norma/eu and /v1/norma/{codigo}
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_norma_router.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/norma/eu | jq 'length' | awk '{if ($1>=10) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: only " $1}' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Cross-reference TEAC resoluciones with EU regulations
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documento_interpretativo WHERE tipo_documento='resolucion_teac' AND (resumen ILIKE '%MiFIR%' OR resumen ILIKE '%EMIR%')" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Update validation suite - EU regulations and new tools
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python scripts/maintenance/mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python scripts/maintenance/mcp_deep_contract_audit.py --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint D complete
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/norma/eu | jq 'length' | awk '{if ($1>=10) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: only " $1}' || echo FAIL
